listitem.para: In what languages would you prepare educational brochures for general health education for Haitians?
What are the primary roles of traditional Haitian men and Women?
Explain the principles of fret and cho. How are these principles applied in dietary practices? In health conditions?
What are the primary health conditions common with Haitians?
Explaining breast-feeding practices common with Haitian mothers. Which practices are potentially dangerous and how would you address them with the mother?
Explain the tenets of voodism. How is voodism seen in health-care practices?
Distinguish natural versus supernatural illness among Haitians.
What is oppression? What education would you include in a patient who has oppression?
What infectious diseases would you look for in recent immigrants from Haiti?
What are traditional Haitian verbal and nonverbal communication practices?
